---
title: "Modeling and Validating a News Recommender Algorithm in a Mainstream Medium-Sized News Organization: An Experimental Approach"
author: "Spyridou, P., Djouvas, C., and Milioni, D."
date: 2022-01-01
description: "Future Internet, 14(10), 284. doi: 10.3390/fi14100284"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
